items.name: all
items.title: blaze-motion
items.description: The full motion engine in one install — tuned tokens (lib/motion.ts), the provider, and all five primitives (FadeIn, Reveal, Stagger, CinematicImage, PageTransition).
items.docs: Mount <MotionProvider> once in your root layout, then wrap anything in <Reveal> / <Stagger> / <FadeIn>. Retune the whole engine from the `feel` block at the top of lib/motion.ts. Primitives import `m` from motion/react-m — a raw motion.* throws under strict mode.
